nasb.text: For they have persecuted him whom You Yourself have smitten, And they tell of the pain of those whom You have wounded.

esv.text: For they persecute him whom you have struck down, and they recount the pain of those you have wounded.

cnv.text: 因為他們迫害你所擊打的人， 嘲笑你所擊傷的人的痛苦。

ccb.text: 因为他们迫害你击打过的人， 嘲笑你所打伤之人的痛苦。

csbs.text: 因为他们追逼你所击打的人， 议论你所击伤之人的痛苦。
